const questionFile = 'scripts/regression_questions.jsonl';
const questionFileHash = 'aaac9acc06780c38bf85441a7883fba533b10f776f043936913c171dd2d2b47e';
const workflowName = 'RAG Regression Batch Runner - Phase 8';
const workflowVersion = 'phase-8-regression-v1';

function uuid() {
  return 'xxxxxxxx-xxxx-4xxx-yxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx'.replace(/[xy]/g, c => {
    const r = Math.floor(Math.random() * 16);
    const v = c === 'x' ? r : (r & 0x3) | 0x8;
    return v.toString(16);
  });
}
function bool(value, fallback) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return fallback;
  if (value === true || value === 'true' || value === 1 || value === '1') return true;
  if (value === false || value === 'false' || value === 0 || value === '0') return false;
  return fallback;
}
function asNumber(value, fallback) {
  const n = Number(value);
  return Number.isFinite(n) ? n : fallback;
}
function selectCases() {
  let selected = allCases;
  const cases = body.cases || body.case_ids || body.case_id || 'all';
  if (cases !== 'all') {
    const wanted = new Set(String(cases).split(',').map(s => s.trim()).filter(Boolean));
    selected = selected.filter(q => wanted.has(q.id));
  }
  if (body.category) {
    const wantedCategory = String(body.category).trim();
    selected = selected.filter(q => q.category === wantedCategory);
  }
  if (body.limit !== undefined && body.limit !== null && body.limit !== '') {
    selected = selected.slice(0, Math.max(0, asNumber(body.limit, selected.length)));
  }
  return selected;
}

const selected = selectCases();
if (selected.length === 0) {
  throw new Error('No regression cases matched the requested filter.');
}

const runMode = body.run_mode || body.mode || 'retrieval_only';
const triggerSource = body.trigger_source || (body.requested_by === 'ci' ? 'regression_ci' : 'regression_manual');
const regressionRunId = body.regression_run_id || uuid();
const allowGemini = bool(body.allow_gemini, runMode === 'full_answer');
const allowDiscordPost = bool(body.allow_discord_post, false);

return selected.map((testCase, index) => ({
  json: {
    regression_run_id: regressionRunId,
    run_case_index: index + 1,
    total_case_count: selected.length,
    question_file: questionFile,
    question_file_hash: questionFileHash,
    workflow_name: workflowName,
    workflow_version: workflowVersion,
    git_sha: body.git_sha || '',
    requested_by: body.requested_by || 'gil',
    trigger_source: triggerSource,
    run_mode: runMode,
    response_mode: body.response_mode || 'ci_artifact',
    allow_gemini: allowGemini,
    allow_discord_post: allowDiscordPost,
    case_id: testCase.id,
    category: testCase.category,
    channel_scope: testCase.channel_scope,
    question: testCase.question,
    user_query: testCase.question,
    expected_action: testCase.expected_action,
    expected_caveat: testCase.expected_caveat,
    expected_flags: testCase.expected_flags,
    expected_behavior: testCase.expected_behavior,
    contamination_risk: testCase.contamination_risk,
    source_area: testCase.source_area,
    discord_message_id: 'regression-' + regressionRunId + '-' + testCase.id,
    channel_id: body.channel_id || 'phase-8-regression',
    channel_name: body.channel_name || 'n8n-regression',
    author_id_hash: body.author_id_hash || 'regression-runner',
    qdrant_collection: body.qdrant_collection || 'tpm_unite_history',
    embedding_url: body.embedding_url || 'http://embedder:8000/embed',
    qdrant_base_url: body.qdrant_base_url || 'http://qdrant:6333',
    reranker_url: body.reranker_url || 'http://reranker:8002/rerank',
    phoenix_collector_url: body.phoenix_collector_url || 'http://trace-emitter:8001/v1/traces',
    phoenix_project_name: body.phoenix_project_name || 'discord-rag-bot-phase-8-regression',
    gemini_url: body.gemini_url || '',
    discord_webhook_url: body.discord_webhook_url || '',
    top_k: asNumber(body.top_k, 20),
    context_k: asNumber(body.context_k, 5),
    min_result_count: asNumber(body.min_result_count, 3),
    retrieval_score_threshold: asNumber(body.retrieval_score_threshold, 0.55),
    reranker_score_threshold: asNumber(body.reranker_score_threshold, 0),
    weak_reranker_score_threshold: asNumber(body.weak_reranker_score_threshold, 2),
    context_token_budget: asNumber(body.context_token_budget, 2200),
    dedupe_overlap_threshold: asNumber(body.dedupe_overlap_threshold, 0.5),
    workflow_contract_version: body.workflow_contract_version || 'phase-8-regression-v1'
  }
}));

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO rag_regression_runs (
  run_id,
  trigger_source,
  run_mode,
  question_file,
  question_file_hash,
  workflow_name,
  workflow_version,
  git_sha,
  status,
  case_count,
  summary_json
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.regression_run_id }}',
  '{{ String($json.trigger_source || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.run_mode || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.question_file || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.question_file_hash || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.workflow_name || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.workflow_version || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.git_sha || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  'started',
  {{ $json.total_case_count }},
  jsonb_build_object(
    'requested_by', '{{ String($json.requested_by || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'response_mode', '{{ String($json.response_mode || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
    'allow_gemini', {{ $json.allow_gemini }},
    'allow_discord_post', {{ $json.allow_discord_post }}
  )
)
ON CONFLICT (run_id) DO UPDATE
SET
  case_count = EXCLUDED.case_count,
  summary_json = rag_regression_runs.summary_json || EXCLUDED.summary_json
RETURNING run_id;

WITH selected AS (
  SELECT
    qdrant_point_id,
    rank,
    rank_after_dedupe,
    retrieval_score,
    reranker_score,
    channel_name,
    thread_name,
    first_message_id,
    message_ids,
    dedupe_status,
    dedupe_reason,
    dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
    dedupe_overlap_ratio,
    dedupe_shared_message_count,
    selected_for_context,
    payload,
    left(coalesce(payload->>'text', payload->>'chunk_text', payload->>'content', ''), 500) AS text_preview
  FROM rag_retrieval_results
  WHERE transaction_id = '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'
), selected_context AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM selected
  WHERE selected_for_context
  ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank)
), all_candidates AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM selected
  ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank)
)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.transaction_id }}'::uuid AS transaction_id,
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE selected_for_context) AS selected_context_count,
  COALESCE(array_agg(DISTINCT channel_name) FILTER (WHERE selected_for_context AND channel_name IS NOT NULL), ARRAY[]::text[]) AS selected_channels,
  COALESCE(array_agg(qdrant_point_id ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank)) FILTER (WHERE selected_for_context), ARRAY[]::text[]) AS selected_chunk_ids,
  COALESCE(array_agg(retrieval_score ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank)) FILTER (WHERE selected_for_context), ARRAY[]::double precision[]) AS retrieval_scores,
  COALESCE(array_agg(reranker_score ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank)) FILTER (WHERE selected_for_context), ARRAY[]::double precision[]) AS reranker_scores,
  COALESCE(MAX((payload->>'context_token_estimate')::int) FILTER (WHERE payload ? 'context_token_estimate'), 0) AS context_token_estimate,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'qdrant_point_id', qdrant_point_id,
      'rank', rank,
      'rank_after_dedupe', rank_after_dedupe,
      'retrieval_score', retrieval_score,
      'reranker_score', reranker_score,
      'channel_name', channel_name,
      'thread_name', thread_name,
      'first_message_id', first_message_id,
      'message_ids', message_ids,
      'dedupe_status', dedupe_status,
      'dedupe_reason', dedupe_reason,
      'dedupe_matched_chunk_id', dedupe_matched_chunk_id,
      'dedupe_overlap_ratio', dedupe_overlap_ratio,
      'dedupe_shared_message_count', dedupe_shared_message_count,
      'selected_for_context', selected_for_context,
      'text_preview', text_preview
    ) ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank))
    FROM selected_context
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS selected_chunks,
  COALESCE((
    SELECT jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object(
      'qdrant_point_id', qdrant_point_id,
      'rank', rank,
      'rank_after_dedupe', rank_after_dedupe,
      'retrieval_score', retrieval_score,
      'reranker_score', reranker_score,
      'channel_name', channel_name,
      'dedupe_status', dedupe_status,
      'dedupe_reason', dedupe_reason,
      'selected_for_context', selected_for_context,
      'text_preview', text_preview
    ) ORDER BY COALESCE(rank_after_dedupe, rank))
    FROM all_candidates
  ), '[]'::jsonb) AS candidate_report
FROM selected;

INSERT INTO rag_regression_results (
  run_id,
  case_id,
  category,
  question,
  expected_action,
  expected_caveat,
  expected_flags,
  expected_behavior,
  transaction_id,
  trace_id,
  actual_status,
  retrieval_status,
  refusal_reason,
  selected_context_count,
  selected_channels,
  selected_chunk_ids,
  retrieval_scores,
  reranker_scores,
  context_token_estimate,
  answer_length,
  citation_status,
  latency_ms,
  outcome,
  failure_type,
  review_notes,
  result_payload
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.regression_run_id }}',
  '{{ String($json.case_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.category || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.question || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.expected_action || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.expected_caveat || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.expected_flags || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ String($json.expected_behavior || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.transaction_id }}', '')::uuid,
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.trace_id || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.actual_status || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.retrieval_status || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.refusal_reason || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  {{ $json.selected_context_count }},
  string_to_array(trim(both '{}' from '{{ $json.selected_channels }}'), ','),
  string_to_array(trim(both '{}' from '{{ $json.selected_chunk_ids }}'), ','),
  string_to_array(trim(both '{}' from '{{ $json.retrieval_scores }}'), ',')::double precision[],
  string_to_array(trim(both '{}' from '{{ $json.reranker_scores }}'), ',')::double precision[],
  {{ $json.context_token_estimate || 0 }},
  NULL,
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.citation_status || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  {{ $json.latency_ms || 0 }},
  '{{ String($json.outcome || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.failure_type || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  NULLIF('{{ String($json.review_notes || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', ''),
  '{{ $json.result_payload_sql_json }}'::jsonb
)
RETURNING run_id, case_id, outcome, transaction_id, selected_context_count;

UPDATE rag_regression_runs
SET
  status = 'completed',
  completed_at = now(),
  case_count = {{ $json.total_cases }},
  pass_count = {{ $json.pass_count }},
  fail_count = {{ $json.fail_count }},
  review_count = {{ $json.review_count }},
  summary_json = '{{ JSON.stringify($json).replace(/'/g, "''") }}'::jsonb
WHERE run_id = '{{ $json.run_id }}'
RETURNING run_id, status, case_count, pass_count, fail_count, review_count, completed_at, summary_json;

meta.description: Phase 8 regression batch runner. Iterates versioned regression questions, calls the shared intake workflow in retrieval-only mode by default, and writes durable run/result rows.
